svg.title: PlayAroundIT Observability Lab Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the Splunk cluster, Elastic observability stack, and Ansible control node running on VMware Workstation via Vagrant

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Elasticsearch in this lab')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Kibana in this lab')
sendPrompt('What does Metricbeat do on the elastic node?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about Ansible in this lab')
sendPrompt('What roles does mgmt-1 serve in the Splunk cluster?')
sendPrompt('What roles does mgmt-2 serve in the Splunk cluster?')
sendPrompt('What does the Universal Forwarder do?')
g.text: Test data generation · auditd configured · audit_readers group · Splunk user has log access
SplunkForwarder service — startup deferred pending secret configuration
Metricbeat — deployed via Ansible to all nodes
system · linux · beat-xpack on every node → ships to Elasticsearch :9200 over TLS
